| | ## metrics.search\_click\_share |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The number of clicks you've received on the Search Network divided by the estimated number of clicks you were eligible to receive. Note: Search click share is reported in the range of 0.1 to 1. Any value below 0.1 is reported as 0.0999. |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\
| Selectable with | The following fields/resources can be selected with this field:<br>[ad\_group](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group)<br>[campaign](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/campaign)<br>[customer](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/customer)<br>[hotel\_group\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/hotel_group_view)<br>[hotel\_performance\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/hotel_performance_view)<br>[keyword\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/keyword_view)<br>[product\_group\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/product_group_view)<br>[segments.ad\_network\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.ad_network_type)<br>[segments.ad\_sub\_network\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.ad_sub_network_type)<br>[segments.date](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.date)<br>[segments.day\_of\_week](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.day_of_week)<br>[segments.device](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.device)<br>[segments.geo\_target\_country](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.geo_target_country)<br>[segments.hotel\_booking\_window\_days](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.hotel_booking_window_days)<br>[segments.hotel\_center\_id](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.hotel_center_id)<br>[segments.hotel\_check\_in\_date](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.hotel_check_in_date)<br>[segments.hotel\_check\_in\_day\_of\_week](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.hotel_check_in_day_of_week)<br>[segments.hotel\_city](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.hotel | | ## metrics.search\_exact\_match\_impression\_share |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The impressions you've received divided by the estimated number of impressions you were eligible to receive on the Search Network for search terms that matched your keywords exactly (or were close variants of your keyword), regardless of your keyword match types. Note: Search exact match impression share is reported in the range of 0.1 to 1. Any value below 0.1 is reported as 0.0999. |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\
| Selectable with | The following fields/resources can be selected with this field:<br>[ad\_group](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group)<br>[campaign](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/campaign)<br>[customer](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/customer)<br>[keyword\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/keyword_view)<br>[segments.ad\_network\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.ad_network_type)<br>[segments.ad\_sub\_network\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.ad_sub_network_type)<br>[segments.date](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.date)<br>[segments.day\_of\_week](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.day_of_week)<br>[segments.device](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.device)<br>[segments.month](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.month)<br>[segments.quarter](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.quarter)<br>[segments.week](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.week)<br>[segments.year](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.year)<br>[targeting\_expansion\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/targeting_expansion_view) | |\

| | ## metrics.search\_rank\_lost\_absolute\_top\_impression\_share |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The number estimating how often your ad wasn't the very first ad among the top ads in the search results due to poor Ad Rank. Note: Search rank lost absolute top impression share is reported in the range of 0 to 0.9. Any value above 0.9 is reported as 0.9001. |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\

| | ## metrics.search\_rank\_lost\_top\_impression\_share |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The number estimating how often your ad didn't show adjacent to the top organic search results due to poor Ad Rank. Note: Search rank lost top impression share is reported in the range of 0 to 0.9. Any value above 0.9 is reported as 0.9001. |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\

| | ## metrics.search\_top\_impression\_share |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The impressions you've received among the top ads compared to the estimated number of impressions you were eligible to receive among the top ads. Note: Search top impression share is reported in the range of 0.1 to 1. Any value below 0.1 is reported as 0.0999. Top ads are generally above the top organic results, although they may show below the top organic results on certain queries. |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\
| Selectable with | The following fields/resources can be selected with this | | ## metrics.trueview\_average\_cpv |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The average amount you pay each time someone views your ad. The average CPV is defined by the total cost of all ad views divided by the number of TrueView views. |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\
| Selectable with | The following fields/resources can be selected with this field:<br>[ad\_group](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group)<br>[ad\_group\_ad](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group_ad)<br>[ad\_group\_ad\_asset\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group_ad_asset_view)<br>[ad\_group\_asset](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group_asset)<br>[ad\_group\_audience\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group_audience_view)<br>[ad\_schedule\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_schedule_view)<br>[age\_range\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/age_range_view)<br>[asset\_field\_type\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/asset_field_type_view)<br>[asset\_group\_asset](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/asset_group_asset)<br>[asset\_set\_type\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/asset_set_type_view)<br>[bidding\_strategy](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/bidding_strategy)<br>[campaign](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/campaign)<br>[campaign\_asset](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/campaign_asset)<br>[campaign\_audience\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/campaign_audience_view)<br>[campaign\_budget](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/campaign_budget)<br>[campaign\_group](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/campaign_group)<br>[campaign\_search\_term\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/campaign_search_term_view)<br>[content\_criterion\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/content_criterion_view)<br>[customer](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/customer)<br>[customer\_asset](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/customer_asset)<br>[detail\_placement\_view](http | | ## metrics.units\_sold |\
| --- |\
| Field description | Units sold is the total number of products sold from orders attributed to your ads. How it works: You report conversions with cart data for completed purchases on your website. Units sold is the total number of products sold from all orders attributed to your ads. Example: Someone clicked on a Shopping ad for a hat then bought the same hat, a shirt and a jacket. The units sold in this order is 3. This metric is only available if you report conversions with cart data. |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\
| Selectable with | The following fields/resources can be selected with this field:<br>[ad\_group](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group)<br>[ad\_group\_ad](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group_ad)<br>[asset\_group\_product\_group\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/asset_group_product_group_view)<br>[campaign](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/campaign)<br>[customer](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/customer)<br>[keyword\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/keyword_view)<br>[product\_group\_view](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/product_group_view)<br>[segments.ad\_network\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.ad_network_type)<br>[segments.ad\_sub\_network\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.ad_sub_network_type)<br>[segments.click\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.click_type)<br>[segments.conversion\_action](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.conversion_action)<br>[segments.conversion\_action\_category](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.conversion_action_category)<br>[segments.conversion\_action\_name](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.conversion_action_name)<br>[segments.date](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.date)<br>[segments.day\_of\_week](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.day_of_week)<br>[segments.device](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.device)<br>[segments.external\_conversion\_source](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.external_conversion_source)<br>[segments.month](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.month)<br>[seg | | ## metrics.value\_per\_all\_conversions\_by\_conversion\_date |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The value of all conversions divided by the number of all conversions. When this column is selected with date, the values in date column means the conversion date. Details for the by\_conversion\_date columns are available at [https://support.google.com/google-ads/answer/9549009](https://support.google.com/google-ads/answer/9549009). |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\
| Selectable with | The following fields/resources can be selected with this | | ## metrics.value\_per\_conversion |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The value of conversions divided by the number of conversions. This only includes conversion actions which include\_in\_conversions\_metric attribute is set to true. If you use conversion-based bidding, your bid strategies will optimize for these conversions. |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\
| Selectable with | The following fields/resources can be selected with this | | ## metrics.value\_per\_conversions\_by\_conversion\_date |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The value of conversions divided by the number of conversions. This only includes conversion actions which include\_in\_conversions\_metric attribute is set to true. If you use conversion-based bidding, your bid strategies will optimize for these conversions. When this column is selected with date, the values in date column means the conversion date. Details for the by\_conversion\_date columns are available at [https://support.google.com/google-ads/answer/9549009](https://support.google.com/google-ads/answer/9549009). |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\
| Selectable with | The following fields/resources can be selected with this | | ## metrics.value\_per\_current\_model\_attributed\_conversion |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The value of current model attributed conversions divided by the number of the conversions. This only includes conversion actions which include\_in\_conversions\_metric attribute is set to true. If you use conversion-based bidding, your bid strategies will optimize for these conversions. |\

| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\

| | ## metrics.value\_per\_platform\_comparable\_conversion |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The value of platform comparable conversions divided by the number of platform comparable conversions. This only includes conversion actions for which include\_in\_conversions\_metric attribute is set to true. If you use conversion-based bidding, your bid strategies will optimize for these conversions. |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\

| | ## metrics.value\_per\_platform\_comparable\_conversions\_by\_conversion\_date |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The value of platform comparable conversions divided by the number of platform comparable conversions. When this metric is segmented by date, the values in the date segment represent the conversion date. This only includes conversion actions for which include\_in\_conversions\_metric attribute is set to true. If you use conversion-based bidding, your bid strategies will optimize for these conversions. |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `DOUBLE` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\
| Selectable with | The following fields/resources can be selected with this field:<br>[ad\_group](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group)<br>[ad\_group\_ad](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group_ad)<br>[campaign](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/campaign)<br>[customer](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/customer)<br>[segments.ad\_destination\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.ad_destination_type)<br>[segments.ad\_format\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.ad_format_type)<br>[segments.ad\_network\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.ad_network_type)<br>[segments.ad\_sub\_network\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.ad_sub_network_type)<br>[segments.click\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.click_type)<br>[segments.conversion\_adjustment](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.conversion_adjustment)<br>[segments.conversion\_attribution\_event\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.conversion_attribution_event_type)<br>[segments.conversion\_lag\_bucket](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.conversion_lag_bucket)<br>[segments.conversion\_or\_adjustment\_lag\_bucket](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.conversion_or_adjustment_lag_bucket)<br>[segments.date](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.date)<br>[segments.day\_of\_week](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.day_of_week)<br>[segments.device](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.device)<br>[segments.month](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.month)<br>[segments.month\_of\_year](htt | | ## metrics.video\_watch\_time\_duration\_millis |\
| --- |\
| Field description | Total watch time duration in milliseconds for video impressions that started playing. For a small percentage of impressions, we may not be able to measure the watch time accurately. In such cases, we adjust the total time to account for any unmeasured time by applying the average watch time of impressions that were measured. |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `INT64` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\
| Selectable with | The following fields/resources can be selected with this field:<br>[ad\_group](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group)<br>[ad\_group\_ad](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/ad_group_ad)<br>[campaign](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/campaign)<br>[customer](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/customer)<br>[segments.ad\_format\_type](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.ad_format_type)<br>[segments.date](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.date)<br>[segments.day\_of\_week](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.day_of_week)<br>[segments.device](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.device)<br>[segments.month](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.month)<br>[segments.quarter](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.quarter)<br>[segments.week](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.week)<br>[segments.year](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/segments#segments.year)<br>[video](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/video)<br>[video\_enhancement](https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/fields/v23/video_enhancement) | |\
| | ## metrics.view\_through\_conversions |\
| --- |\
| Field description | The total number of view-through conversions. These happen when a customer sees an image or rich media ad, then later completes a conversion on your site without interacting with (for example, clicking on) another ad. |\
| Category | `METRIC` |\
| Data Type | `INT64` |\
| Type URL | `N/A` |\
| Filterable | True |\
| Selectable | True |\
| Sortable | True |\
| Repeated | False |\
| Selectable with | The following fields/resources can be selected with this
